.file-embed.background: rgb(240, 242, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(41, 44, 46) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-header-breadcrumb.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-breadcrumb-separator.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

.view-header-title.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--default-font: Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace
body.--file-header-font: '??', '??', Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--font-interface: '??', '??', Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--font-monospace: Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace
body.--metadata-input-font: '??', '??', Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
body.--metadata-label-font: '??', '??', Source Code Pro, Fira Code, monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(203, 77, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(203, 77, 73) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(57, 63, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(57, 63, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.multi-select-pill-content.font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(57, 63, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "??", "Source Code Pro", "Fira Code", monospace, ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

kbd.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(240, 255, 82, 0.76) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(37, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
